base_url.description: Zendesk account root URL, for example https://example.zendesk.com. Do not include /api/v2.

access_token.description: OAuth2 access token. Preferred over API-token Basic auth when both credential shapes are configured.

api_token.description: Zendesk API token paired with email for Basic auth.

email.description: Zendesk agent email paired with api_token for Basic auth.
